title: Write numbers in number and word form
description: Write numbers in number and word form within 1000.
topic_path: Numbers in standard, word, and expanded form
Write numbers in number and word form

hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $421$ in words.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD4$ | $\blueE2$ | $\maroonD1$

Now, let's say the number $\purpleD4\blueE2\maroonD1$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\purpleD{\text{four hundred}}\blueE{\text{ twenty-}}\maroonD{\text{one}}$
$421$ is written as four hundred twenty-one.

Let's use a place value chart to write $309$ in words.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD3$ | $\blueE0$ | $\maroonD9$

Now, let's say the number $\purpleD3\blueE0\maroonD9$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\purpleD{\text{three hundred}}\maroonD{\text{ nine}}$
$309$ is written as three hundred nine.

Let's use a place value chart to write $856$ in words.

 Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$\purpleD8$ | $\blueE5$ | $\maroonD6$

Now, let's say the number $\purpleD8\blueE5\maroonD6$ out loud and write it in written form.

$\purpleD{\text{eight hundred}}\blueE{\text{ fifty-}}\maroonD{\text{six}}$
$856$ is written as eight hundred fifty-six.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is "seven hundred forty" in number form?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\blueE{\text{seven hundred}}\purpleD{\text{ forty}}$ in number form.

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE7$ | $\purpleD4$ | $\maroonD0$
"Seven hundred forty" in number form is $740$.

$\blueE9$ | $\purpleD5$ | $\maroonD9$

 Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\blueE0$ | $\purpleD6$ | $\maroonD8$
"Sixty-eight" in number form is $68$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its written form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueE{\text{ Three hundred }} \maroonD{\text{eight}} =\blueE{3}0\maroonD8$
$\blueE{\text{Three hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ sixty-}} \maroonD{\text{eight}} =\blueE{3}\purpleD{6}\maroonD8$
$\blueE{\text{Three hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ eighty-}} \maroonD{\text{six}} =\blueE{3}\purpleD{8}\maroonD6$

Here is the completed table:

Written form | Number
:-: | :-: 
Three hundred eight | $308$
Three hundred sixty-eight | $368$
Three hundred eighty-six | $386$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its written form.**


[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueE{\text{Seven hundred }}\purpleD{\text{forty-}} \maroonD{\text{nine}} =\blueE{7}\purpleD4\maroonD9$
$\blueE{\text{Seven hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ ninety-}} \maroonD{\text{four}} =\blueE{7}\purpleD{9}\maroonD4$
$\blueE{\text{Four hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ seventy-}} \maroonD{\text{nine}} =\blueE{4}\purpleD{7}\maroonD9$

Here is the completed table:

Written form | Number
:-: | :-: 
Seven hundred forty-nine | $749$
Seven hundred ninety-four | $794$
Four hundred seventy-nine | $479$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match each number to its written form.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueE{\text{One hundred }}\purpleD{\text{twenty-}} \maroonD{\text{five}} =\blueE{1}\purpleD2\maroonD5$
$\blueE{\text{Five hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ twenty-}} \maroonD{\text{one}} =\blueE{5}\purpleD{2}\maroonD1$
$\blueE{\text{Five hundred}} \purpleD{\text{ twelve}} =\blueE{5}\purpleD{1}\maroonD2$

Here is the completed table:

Number | Written form
:-: | :-: 
$125$ | One hundred twenty-five
$521$ | Five hundred twenty-one
$512$ | Five hundred twelve
